_metadata.scope_note: Shared namespace. Inline field validation messages used across onboarding forms and dashboard modals. Do not duplicate into feature namespaces.

display_name_too_short: Display name must be at least {min_length} characters.
bpm_out_of_range: Tempo must be between {min} and {max} BPM.

_notes.bpm_out_of_range: [PLACEHOLDER] {min} and {max} are integers. BPM is a universal abbreviation — keep as-is in all locales.
